import { dt as extensions } from "./Geometry-Bst8trPt.js";
import { l as Container } from "./Filter-zX_yb7DM.js";
import "./FilterSystem-C4qh1eiq.js";
import { c as DOMPipe, d as AccessibilitySystem, n as EventSystem, t as FederatedContainer, u as accessibilityTarget } from "./FederatedEventTarget-BXIUZBsY.js";
import "./init-CCsN4Sjw.js";
//#region node_modules/pixi.js/lib/accessibility/init.mjs
extensions.add(AccessibilitySystem);
extensions.mixin(Container, accessibilityTarget);
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/pixi.js/lib/dom/init.mjs
extensions.add(DOMPipe);
//#endregion
//#region node_modules/pixi.js/lib/events/init.mjs
extensions.add(EventSystem);
extensions.mixin(Container, FederatedContainer);
//#endregion

//# sourceMappingURL=browserAll-C0vmFXa5.js.map
